title: Universal Tool Antique Grandfather Brass Clock Key 4 Prongs - Even Numbers
description:
Do you need a sturdy and reliable replacement for your lost or misplaced clock key? The Universal Tool 4 Way Clock Key allows for the replacement or back up of original clock keys that are often lost over time. This clock key can be used to wind grandfather clocks and other antique clocks so you can restore both beauty and functionality to your special clock. The key is made of durable brass material and will last a lifetime. The sizes that come with this key are 4, 6, 8 and 10. This is a great find!
